name: Chipits No-Bake Cereal Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring butter, brown sugar, and corn syrup to a boil over medium heat.
2. Remove from heat and stir in 1 cup of peanut butter chips until well combined.
3. Mix in the remaining Corn Flakes cereal.
4. Press mixture into a greased 13 x 9 inch (3.5L) pan.
5. Melt the remaining peanut butter chips and chocolate chips over hot water.
6. Spread evenly over the bars.
7. Chill to set the chocolate, then cut into bars.
